justification: The issue describes a specific bug in the conversion of NumPy masked arrays to pandas arrays, which is inconsistent with user expectations and how `pd.Series` handles similar conversions.
current_state_summary: The issue has been closed as a duplicate report, but the underlying bug is still present and not addressed. Related issues are open for other bugs.

related_issues.title: BUG: DataFrame.melt silently corrupts data on var_name output-name collisions
BUG:  `read_excel` with `usecols` still mangles column names when duplicates exist elsewhere in spreadsheet
